## Summary

## Scope

- Why is this change needed?
- What public behavior, docs, or contracts changed?

## Validation

- [ ] `make verify` passed, or I included the exact targeted commands I ran
- [ ] Docs were updated if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] No secrets or private credentials were committed
- [ ] No generated artifacts or local junk were committed
- [ ] Scope and rollout risk are explained

## Data or calendrical evidence

- [ ] Not applicable
- [ ] Included source references and impact notes for date/rule/trust changes
